human_actions_pending.action: Browser smoke-test View Transitions smoothness entering /onsite/kerry-james-marshall and returning
human_actions_pending.context: ANIM-04 visual quality — automated checks confirm code paths but transition timing is a perceptual judgment

human_actions_pending.context: data-mode attribute is set on <html> in BaseLayout — confirm no FOUC

human_actions_pending.context: autoplay muted loop playsinline preload=metadata all present in markup; iOS behavior can still surprise

human_actions_pending.context: scroll-snap + SectionWrapper stacking interaction is the main risk for touch

human_actions_pending.action: Review HorizontalSlider peek-scale timing and CinematicReveal left-position alignment on the detail page
human_actions_pending.context: IntersectionObserver thresholds and imagePosition='left' prop are new — visual review only

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to promote 03-04 (paywall + simulated login + audio guide overlay + profile overlay) into a real plan or defer
human_actions_pending.context: ROADMAP SCs 5-8 still open; headphones button on artwork cards is a silent stub waiting for that wiring

decisions.decision: Hero <video> is plain HTML5 with autoplay muted loop playsinline preload=metadata poster; no transition:persist, no GSAP ScrollTrigger
decisions.rationale: Static background video only — View Transitions + GSAP on the element caused unreliable autoplay in research

decisions.decision: Headphones button on artwork cards is a silent stub — rendered/styled, click does nothing, no dispatchEvent
decisions.rationale: 03-04 will wire it to paywall + audio guide; pre-emitting an event would create a dead contract

decisions.decision: Intro copy lives in its own SectionWrapper between CinematicReveal and ArtworkSlider
decisions.rationale: Preserves /onsite stacking cadence instead of merging intro into the slider header

decisions.decision: onsiteExhibition content file uses id-keyed object map wrapper ({ 'kerry-james-marshall': {...} })
decisions.rationale: Matches the 03-02 home.json deviation for single-file collections
Research file incorrectly listed /videos/ — corrected during planning
Only one real detail page exists; other cards should not imply a live link

next_action: Run the browser smoke-test for /onsite/kerry-james-marshall in desktop + iOS Safari against the items listed in 03-VERIFICATION.md human-verification section, then decide 03-04 vs. Phase 04.
context_notes: Phase 03-dual-mode-routing is code-complete: all three plans (03-01 router + dark onsite cascade + URL-as-state toggle, 03-02 /onsite landing with exhibition grid, 03-03 KJM detail page) are shipped and committed on master. Verifier returned 7/7 automated checks PASS and flagged 6 browser-only items as human_needed. ROADMAP SCs 5-8 (paywall, simulated login, audio guide overlay, profile overlay) remain deferred — no 03-04 plan file exists yet. No blockers, no regressions, working tree clean except for untracked .claude/.
